# CANDIDATE: GENERAL_V14_V15_QUALITY_TIERED_SWEEP

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** Parameter optimization — quality-tiered exit structure
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-OOS-WALK-FORWARD)

## Hypothesis

A quality-tiered exit structure (SUPER/LEVEL/TRENDLINE with differentiated stops, TP1s, and qty) can improve edge_capture by avoiding J's loser days while capturing winners. The top keeper adds ZERO losers vs baseline, which drives the edge_capture above threshold.

## Mechanism

Quality-tiered exit parameters:
- **SUPER:** stop=-0.20, tp1=1.0, runner_target=3.0
- **LEVEL:** stop=-0.10, tp1=0.3, qty=18
- **TRENDLINE:** stop=-0.06

Entry logic unchanged from baseline. Exit logic applies tier-specific parameters.

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | +$342 | +$306.30 | -$35.70 |
| 5/01 winner | +$470 | -$16.17 | -$486.17 |
| 5/04 winner | +$730 | +$804.72 | +$74.72 |
| 5/05 loser | -$260 | $0.00 | +$260 (avoided) |
| 5/06 loser | -$300 | $0.00 | +$300 (avoided) |
| 5/07 loser 1 | -$45 | $0.00 | +$45 (avoided) |
| 5/07 loser 2 | -$120 | $0.00 | +$120 (avoided) |

**edge_capture = $1,094.85** — passes $771 floor.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=18 requires $25K+; $1K paper realizes ~18% of headline P&L
2. **Sample bias:** 5/6 quarters negative — edge concentrated in single Q1-2026 quarter (+$5,432). High overfit risk.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS — no walk-forward reported. Grinder output is in-sample only.
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS — BS-sim only, no OPRA validation
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Q1-2026 concentration = 540% of total P&L (regime-dependent)
   - Q2-2026 already -$1,120 (partial quarter)
   - 5/01 winner missed entirely (-$486 vs baseline)
   - 16.1% win rate over 353 trades
6. **Concentration:** top5_pct=13.23% (表面上健康), but quarterly: Q1-2026 = +$5,432 vs total +$1,005 = 540% concentration

## Pre-merge gate

- [ ] OOS walk-forward validation (IS vs OOS Sharpe ratio ≥ 0.50)
- [ ] Real-fills check on top 3 J days
- [ ] Quarterly concentration analysis (no single quarter > 80% of total P&L)
- [ ] Gym validators

## Confidence

3/10 — Edge_capture passes but quarterly P&L is catastrophic (5/6 negative). The "zero losers added" is the primary driver, which could be data-snooping. Needs OOS walk-forward before any consideration.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Does not conflict with existing candidates. Complements #12 (V14E_PARAM_SWEEP_26K) — this is a quality-tiered variant vs single-tier optimization. However, without OOS validation, this should not be RATIFICATION_READY.
